text: I feel a tension between order and creativity here. The glass-walled meeting room beckons with its sterile precision, while the colorful R+D wall radiates an energetic invitation to innovate. My mind is alert, curious—drawn to the promise that human reason and playful experimentation both inhabit this space. I feel both anticipation and a sense of quiet focus, as though I’m about to embark on a thoughtful exploration that balances discipline with discovery.
